UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the application.

preferences.description: User's preferences (e.g., UI settings, notification preferences).

profilePhotoUrl.description: URL of the user's profile photo stored in Cloud Storage.

userId.description: Reference to UserProfile owning this resume.

title.description: The title or name of the resume (e.g., 'Software Engineer Resume').

content.description: Resume content, stored as a JSON object.

styling.description: Resume styling options, such as font sizes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the resume was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the resume was last modified.

description.description: A description of the template's style and features.

styling.description: Styling information for the template (e.g., CSS rules), stored as a JSON object.

layout.description: Layout information for the template (e.g., section arrangements), stored as a JSON object.

previewUrl.description: URL of the template's preview image.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Represents user feedback and collaboration comments.

userId.description: Reference to UserProfile who gave feedback.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles, subscription status, and preferences.

/users/{userId}/resumes/{resumeId}.description: Stores resume data for a specific user. Path-based ownership is enforced via the /users/{userId} path.

/templates/{templateId}.description: Stores available resume templates. These are globally accessible.

/resumes/{resumeId}/feedback/{feedbackId.description: Stores feedback for a specific resume. Access control depends on resume ownership or collaboration status.
